channel.title: Github.com on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Github.com on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Ask questions in context with Copilot on web
item.description:
Copilot chat on the web now opens directly on the page you’re viewing, so you can ask questions in context with less switching between pages.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions now generally available on mobile, web, and VS Code
item.description:
Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions is now generally available on GitHub Mobile and github.com, with support also referenced for VS Code. It lets you start work in the terminal and continue managing the session from mobile or web.

  • Source: GitHub
